objects.name: x-oca-behavior Extension Definition
objects.description: Behavior objects define adversary behaviors associated with higher level MITRE ATT&CK tactics and techniques. The Attack Pattern SDO may have multiple behaviors associated with it. For example, a spearphishing attack may employ multiple behaviors (usage of email attachments, process modifying a registry key, network patterns, etc.).

objects.name: x-oca-coa-playbook-ext Extension Definition
objects.description: A property extension for the Course of Action SDO for sharing automated courses of action (i.e., orchestration workflows or playbooks).

objects.name: x-oca-detection Extension Definition
objects.description: Detections contain logic to detect an adversary behavior.

objects.name: x-oca-detector Extension Definition
objects.description: Detector objects define tools, software, products, etc. that are capable of performing detection. They should likely be related to one or more Detection obects.

objects.name: x-oca-playbook Extension Definition
objects.description: A Playbook object represents a structured process, such as an orchestration workflow, alongside associated metadata.

objects.name: Unknown External Connection Established
objects.description: A connection to an external IP address with an unrecognizable port was established

external_references.description: Adversaries may use Valid Accounts to remotely control machines using Virtual Network Computing (VNC). VNC is a platform-independent desktop sharing system that uses the RFB ("remote framebuffer") protocol to enable users to remotely control another computer’s display by relaying the screen, mouse, and keyboard inputs over the network.

Adversaries may leverage external-facing remote services to initially access and/or persist within a network. Remote services such as VPNs, Citrix, and other access mechanisms allow users to connect to internal enterprise network resources from external locations.
Adversaries may abuse PowerShell commands and scripts for execution.

objects.name: Correlate and Score Behaviors
objects.description: This workflow correlates an observed behavior with related behaviors. The number of behaviors are tallied into points with a higher score increasing the likelihood that an attack has been observed. Decode the Base64 string for the playbook contents.

objects.name: Unknown External Connection Established

analytic.type: Sigma Rule - base64 encoded YAML file

objects.description: This detection looks for new connections to external IP addresses that have not been previously seen

objects.name: VNC Connection Established

analytic.type: Sigma Rule - base64 encoded YAML file

objects.description: This detection looks for a new VNC connection between internal IP addresses

objects.name: PowerShell Script Execution

analytic.type: Sigma Rule - base64 encoded YAML file

objects.description: This detection looks for Windows 4104 events, indicating PowerShell script execution
